national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Pacific Precious Metals
buyers.address: 302 Caledonia St #3, Sausalito, CA 94965 (HQ; also Palo Alto, Fremont, Walnut Creek)
buyers.payout_claims: Dental gold page claims "total payouts usually exceed a 100% payout on the price of the gold alone" (pays for palladium too); bullion buy prices quoted off live spot
buyers.testing_transparency: Site describes state-of-the-art x-ray fluorescence analysis to determine purity and composition; says it can identify 26 different metals.
buyers.evidence_notes: Bullion dealer 'now surpassing 15 years in business' with four Bay Area stores; header advertises 'Fully insured Shipping'; XRF assay named on cash-for-gold page; no appointment needed.

buyers.name: Bay Area Metals
buyers.address: 154 South Spruce Ave, South San Francisco, CA 94080
buyers.payout_claims: "The Highest Payouts" — sell direct to the refinery, "you don't have to share the profit with a middleman"; no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site describes "Accurate Assaying": "We will assay your gold scrap and make you an offer based on our findings" — no hidden fees stated.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned refinery claiming '#1 Bay Area Gold Refining Company'; accepts walk-ins and mail-in ('Ship your precious metals to us securely or come in person'); explicit 'No hidden fees!' language on assay process; hours not posted.

buyers.name: Bay Area Gold & Silver Buyers (GSB)
buyers.payout_claims: "Top Prices. Instant Cash" — "we pay you instantly on the spot"; no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "We test, weigh, and value your items in front of you" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: "For over 15 years, we've helped thousands of people turn unwanted items into money"; 'No pressure, no hidden fees'; appointments highly recommended, walk-ins welcome; second location in Houston.

buyers.name: Steven's Manufacturing Jewelers
buyers.address: 490 Post Street, Suite 1644, San Francisco, CA 94102
buyers.payout_claims: "We test and weigh your gold right in front of you, then tell you what we are offering. You get paid, in cash, on the spot." — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says they test and weigh your gold right in front of you; specific method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Claims "the most trusted gold buyer in San Francisco for 45 years" and "the ONLY gold buyers who are goldsmiths and metallurgist of precious metals in the bay area"; Union Square upstairs suite; hours not posted.

buyers.name: San Francisco Diamond & Jewelry Buyers
buyers.hours: Not posted on site; appointment scheduling offered
buyers.payout_claims: "We consistently pay more than pawn shops and pawnbrokers" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described by the business itself; a customer review on the site mentions acid testing.
buyers.evidence_notes: Search-result snippet says established 1974; buys diamonds, estate jewelry, scrap gold, watches from offices in 'the San Francisco diamond district' (SOMA); discreet immediate payment via check or cash; 'Call or text us today.'

buyers.name: Coin Gold & Stamp Buyer
buyers.address: 303 12th Ave, San Francisco, CA 94118 (second store: 629 S B St, San Mateo, CA 94401)
buyers.payout_claims: "Our gold buyers in San Francisco pay you the exact amount and not less the worth of your products" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "We test the articles that you bring to us and weigh them properly" with processes "done in front of you" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Coin, gold, and stamp buyer with two Bay Area storefronts; emphasizes 'transparent dealings'; no founding date, hours, or credentials posted — thin site, details should be confirmed.

buyers.name: Elite Fine Jewelry, Inc.
buyers.payout_claims: "GET THE MOST CASH! WE PAY TOP DOLLAR!" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site.
